seoDescription: California State Insulation — a licensed Santa Rosa insulation and general contractor (CSLB #795223) serving Sonoma County and the North Bay since 2001.
heroSubheading: A licensed Santa Rosa insulation and general contractor (CSLB #795223) serving the North Bay for over two decades.
aboutBody: California State Insulation has served Santa Rosa and the North Bay since 2001. Owner-manager Alvaro Beltran leads a team that handles both insulation work and broader general construction across Sonoma County.

Holding California license #795223 — covering Insulation & Acoustical (C-2) and General Building (B) — the company takes on everything from attic and wall insulation to framing, drywall, stucco, and concrete.
Based on Tapadera Drive in Santa Rosa, the company has built a track record on residential and commercial projects throughout the area, with a focus on quality workmanship and fair pricing.

services.title: Insulation Installation
services.description: Installation of insulating materials for temperature and sound control in homes and commercial buildings.

services.title: Insulation Removal
services.description: Removal of old or blown-in attic insulation before re-insulating or remodeling.

services.title: Drywall & Plaster
services.description: Interior drywall, taping, and plaster work to finish rooms after insulation and framing.

services.title: Framing
services.description: Structural framing as part of new construction and remodeling projects.

services.title: Stucco
services.description: Exterior stucco application for residential and commercial work.

services.title: Concrete & Demolition
services.description: Concrete work and demolition as part of larger general-contracting projects.

testimonials.quote: They removed blown-in insulation from our attic and did excellent work — and have since done insulation and drywall in five rooms of our home. Excellent quality, very fair price.
testimonials.author: Google reviewer

testimonials.quote: On time, knowledgeable, and friendly, with a clean installation of attic insulation.
testimonials.author: Google reviewer
